reports.thesis: Spread z = +2.4 (rich) on a clean cointegration: ADF p_adj 0.012, OU half-life 4.1 cycles, rolling re-test still cointegrated. Lean SHORT the spread (short y / long x) back toward mu.
Spread z = -2.1 (cheap); ADF p_adj 0.031, half-life 6.3 cycles, cointegration holding on the re-test. Lean LONG the spread back toward mu.
